visual_description: A man in a pink plaid shirt stands facing a man in a blue checkered shirt, gesturing with his right hand while speaking. The man in blue stands with his back to the camera, listening. Behind them is a wall with a framed picture and a wall sconce, and part of a couch is visible.
audio_description: The man in pink speaks in a conversational tone, using hand gestures. The man in blue remains silent.
